title: Tiger (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Tiger}}
'''''Tiger''''' was a group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They, along with some [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], attempted to prevent the destruction of an Imperial research facility which was trying to duplicate the [[shield X]] that was used in [[Operation Ram's Head]].

However, they arrived too late to prevent the destruction of the corvette ''[[Trigger 3]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
